flashcards.definition: A one- or two-letter abbreviation for an element (e.g., Na, Cl, Fe).
A tabular arrangement of elements by increasing atomic number and recurring properties.
A vertical column on the periodic table; elements share similar chemical properties.
A horizontal row on the periodic table; properties change systematically across.
Writing an element with its mass number and atomic number (e.g., ¹²₆C).
